---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format: html
---

<div class="about-container">

<div class="about-image">
<img src="images/FullSizeRender.png">
</div>

<div class="about-text">

# Get to Know Me

I’m a geomatics professional with a background in geology and a deep-rooted curiosity about maps and landscapes.

After completing a postgraduate diploma in Geographic Information Systems (GIS) at Sir Sandford Fleming College, I’ve worked across public and private sectors including Parks Canada, GHD, and the City of Hamilton, supporting environmental analysis and spatial decision-making.

Currently, I’m pursuing the **Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management (MGEM)** at UBC, focusing on individual tree segmentation using airborne LiDAR data with Natural Resources Canada.

Outside of work, I enjoy reading, biking, and staying active — ideally somewhere near trees.

</div>

</div>
